title: apium graveolens var. dulce
intro: Apium graveolens var. dulce, commonly known as sweet fennel or dulce fennel, is a variety of the fennel plant that is cultivated for its sweet and anise-flavored seeds. The medicinal properties of sweet fennel include its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of consuming sweet fennel include relief from flatulence, indigestion, and menstrual cramps, as well as improved respiratory health. Sweet fennel is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and dried seeds, which can be used to calm the stomach, ease coughs, and promote relaxation.
